goal: Ensure yoyo can construct DeepSeek beta chat prefix completion requests without routing through generic provider assumptions.
tests: cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- deepseek prefix-check --prompt 'Write a summary' --prefix 'Summary:' --max-tokens 32 --json
cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- eval fixtures validate --suite local-smoke
hidden_failure_mode: Chat prefix completion is listed as a DeepSeek-native surface, but the harness has no explicit beta chat request shape or validation.
